# json / storage

The **json** type's storage capability: contributes `Fields.Storage` (server
runtime) mapping the `json` field token to a Postgres `jsonb` column via
`build(name) => jsonb(name)`. The bare runtime column is `jsonb`; the
compile-time `$type<…>()` brand is a type-only concern with no runtime artifact,
applied generically by the entity builder (Stage C). Resolved by exact token
through `resolveFieldStorage("json")`.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: JSON field type: DB storage capability — maps to a Postgres jsonb column.
- Server:
  - Uses: `fields/server-capabilities.Fields`
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by: `fields/server-capabilities-loader`
